abilities.description: Skywrath Mage launches a slow-moving bolt of arcane magic, dealing damage to an enemy unit based on Skywrath Mage's intelligence.
abilities.name: Arcane Bolt
abilities.story: Within the Ghastly Eyrie's endless intrigue, only the clever and calm can hope to survive.

abilities.description: Skywrath Mage sets off a long range shot that hits the closest hero within a long range. Upon impact, it deals damage and slows in an area of effect. Deals 75% damage to creeps.
abilities.name: Concussive Shot
abilities.story: Those who serve the court of the Ghastly Eyrie are ever locked in covert war. One must always know where danger lurks nearest.

abilities.description: Skywrath Mage seals the targeted unit with an ancient rune, silencing it and causing it to take additional damage from spells.
abilities.name: Ancient Seal
abilities.story: A holy incantation, whosoever finds themselves touched by Avilliva's sigil must suffer in penitent silence.

abilities.description: Every time Skywrath Mage deals magic damage to an enemy hero with an ability, he gains a buff that grants bonus Intelligence and Armor. Each charge stacks independently.
abilities.name: Shield of the Scion

abilities.description: Skywrath Mage uses his ultimate physical ability to conjure a precise and violent mystical field that lays waste to his adversaries. Deals massive damage distributed evenly among any Heroes in the area over seconds.
abilities.name: Mystic Flare
abilities.story: Only the most practiced of Skywrath sorcerers could hope to shape the skies into such a storm.

description: Casts high damage physical spells on a single target. Bound to his courtly duties, Dragonus could only dream in secret of restoring his beloved to her rightful throne. Deadly and only protected by the Shield of the Scion, Skywrath Mage quickly destroys his enemies with a barrage of powerful magic. Blasting concentrated Arcane Bolts at his targets and crippling them momentarily with a long range Concussive Shot. Those who stand in his way would be muted by an Ancient Seal, exposing their vulnerability before the Skywrath Mage annihilates and vaporizes them in the storm of Mystic Flare.  Support Nuker Disabler  Flying, Wings, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: In the start of Vengeful Spirit's lore, the Skywrath is stated as being hateful and vengeful, yet Dragonus carries none of these traits, and is instead mild-mannered and tempered.
